title: eulophia spathulifera
intro: Eulophia spathulifera, also known as the African orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating a range of health conditions. The health benefits of Eulophia spathulifera include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically prepared by boiling the roots or leaves in water or extracting the active compounds with a solvent.
